description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for the Windows Calculator Continuous Integration Pipeline. The workflow should trigger on push to main, release, and feature branches, and on pull requests to these branches. It should also be dispatchable. The workflow consists of four jobs: defineBuilds, build, unitTests, and uiTests. The defineBuilds job determines the version number, platform list, and unit test platform list. The build job uses this information to build the calculator.sln project for each platform. The unitTests job runs unit tests for each platform. The uiTests job runs UI tests for the x64 platform.
